arts.ttl: Why Mikel Merino and Ben White are not in Arsenal squad for Crystal Palace amid PSG worry
arts.sum: Mikel Merino and Ben White have not been named in the Arsenal squad to take on Crystal Palace. The Gunners welcome Oliver Glasner's side to Emirates Stadium on Wednesday evening, with Mikel Arteta intent on building some momentum ahead of the vital Champions League semi-final first leg against PSG next Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners midfielder 'receives Flamengo propasal' amid Saudi Arabia links
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Jorginho reportedly receives a proposal to join Brazilian club Flamengo when his contract expires this summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News: Thomas Partey open to Arsenal extension - David Ornstein
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Thomas Partey is open to a contract extension, according to David Ornstein. David Ornstein of The Athletic has revealed that the midfielder is open to a contract extension.

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Palace team news: Saka, Sarr + Mateta benched

arts.ttl: Berta may hold key to Partey's Arsenal future
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Thomas Partey's future remains unclear but recently appointed sporting director Andrea Berta may have the key to unlocking the uncertainty surrounding the player's contractual impasse.

arts.ttl: UEFA could make THREE changes to Champions League format after Arsenal complaint
arts.sum: The Champions League's new 36-team format has been in place for the first time this season but some changes have been floated before the end of the current campaign

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Crystal Palace: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8pm BST kick-off Live scores | Tables | And read today’s Football Daily “Thoughts on the Champions League?” writes Arsenal fan Bill Hargreaves. “(Give me the pain.)” Before the second legs of the quarter-finals I thought PSG were fairly strong favourites; now I’d say it’s about 60/40. Arteta’s Arsenal are a formidable team when they get on a roll; this is definitely their best chance since 2006. I have a feeling Inter will beat Barcelona and then lose to PSG or Arsenal in the final. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Team News: Glasner names starting XI for Arsenal test
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has made four changes to his Crystal Palace starting XI to face Arsenal at the Emirates Stadium on Wednesday evening.
